titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2192
GA 2192
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Repeat of καθως ειπον υμιν moved from 10.26 to 10.27 by David Parker.
εμοι added at 18.36 by David Parker.
Second των added at 18.3 by David Parker.
1.1c-14a Om changed to 1.1c-14a Lac by Rachel Kevern.
οτι ο οχλος corrected to ο οχλος οτι at 6.24C by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 10.10 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 4.43 by Rachel Kevern.
Correction edited at 11.48 and word break at 17.12 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Corrector changed to corrector* at 16.26 by Rachel Kevern.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status: G-A Number:2192Athos, Philotheu,1849(85) Name of book transcribed: John First folio transcribed:1 recto Base text used: TRns Transcribed by: WJE Transcription begun:13–04–11 Transcription finished: 25-05-11 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - No Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - Νo Obeloi (†) - No Other remarks: F 005v and 6r – scans of folio not available.Almost certainly there is more than one scribe involved, but I have not found it possible to split them up, e.g., look at folios 162 recto and verso.Multipe {|L|}comm added and file οf errοrs in this transcriptiοn created by Edgar Ebοjο 20.08.2012. Errοrs fixed by RK 21.08.2012

ab.note: Images of folios 5v and 6r were not available at the time of transcribing. This folio probably contains 1.24.27.
This verse is also found on Folio 7v
An enlarged initial letter often starts a block of biblical text. Here we have both an ordinary initial letter and an enlarged addition.
The following is marked wrongly as biblical text: αι o τoις μαθηταις επεταξετo παρα των μαθητων εν={|L|}τρεφεσθαι
An enlarged initial letter often starts a block of biblical text. Here we have both an ordinary initial letter and an enlarged addition.
An enlarged initial letter often starts a block of biblical text. Here we have both an ordinary initial letter and an enlarged addition.
Images of folios 142v and 143r were not available at the time of transcribing. This folio probably contains 15.7-13.
